untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern detection requires identifying twin bottoms at similar price levels and confirmation line (highest high in pattern). These require pattern recognition and multi-bar lookback logic that cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators and the allowed operators. Specifically: (1) identifying two distinct bottom swing points, (2) verifying they are at similar levels, (3) finding the highest high between them, (4) volume comparison between left and right bottoms, and (5) U-shaped volume pattern all require custom pattern detection logic unavailable in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The core breakout condition (close > confirmation line) is translatable as close crossing above a prior high, and volume preference is expressible. However, the pattern identification itself (twin bottoms, their relative levels, inter-bottom swing analysis, and U-shaped volume curve) requires custom pattern scanning beyond atomic indicator rules. A backtest engine would need a dedicated Double Bottom pattern detector module.
